name: doctl
description: The official DigitalOcean command line interface (CLI)

subcommands.name: completion
subcommands.description: Configure your terminal's shell so that doctl commands autocomplete when you press the TAB key

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Display help about commands

subcommands.name: 1-click
subcommands.description: The commands under `doctl 1-click` are for interacting with DigitalOcean 1-Click applications

subcommands.name: account
subcommands.description: The subcommands of `doctl account` retrieve information about DigitalOcean accounts

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Retrieve account profile details

subcommands.name: ratelimit
subcommands.description: Retrieve your API usage and the remaining quota

subcommands.name: apps
subcommands.description: Display commands for working with apps

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create an app

subcommands.name: create-deployment
subcommands.description: Create a deployment

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Deletes an app

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Get an app

subcommands.name: get-deployment
subcommands.description: Get a deployment

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List all apps

subcommands.name: list-alerts
subcommands.description: List alerts on an app

subcommands.name: list-deployments
subcommands.description: List all deployments

subcommands.name: list-regions
subcommands.description: List App Platform regions

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: Get logs

subcommands.name: propose
subcommands.description: Propose an app spec

subcommands.name: spec
subcommands.description: Display commands for working with app specs

subcommands.name: tier
subcommands.description: Display commands for working with app tiers

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update an app

subcommands.name: update-alert-destinations
subcommands.description: Update alert destinations

subcommands.name: auth
subcommands.description: Display commands for authenticating doctl with an account

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Initialize doctl to use a specific account

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List available authentication contexts

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove authentication contexts

subcommands.name: switch
subcommands.description: Switches between authentication contexts

subcommands.name: balance
subcommands.description: Display commands for retrieving your account balance

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Retrieve your account balance

subcommands.name: billing-history
subcommands.description: Display commands for retrieving your billing history

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Retrieve a paginated billing history for a user

subcommands.name: compute
subcommands.description: Display commands that manage infrastructure

subcommands.name: action
subcommands.description: Display commands for retrieving resource action history

subcommands.name: cdn
subcommands.description: Display commands that manage CDNs

subcommands.name: certificate
subcommands.description: Display commands that manage SSL certificates and private keys

subcommands.name: domain
subcommands.description: Display commands that manage domains

subcommands.name: droplet
subcommands.description: Manage virtual machines (Droplets)

subcommands.name: droplet-action
subcommands.description: Display Droplet action commands

subcommands.name: firewall
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage cloud firewalls

subcommands.name: floating-ip
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage floating IP addresses

subcommands.name: floating-ip-action
subcommands.description: Display commands to associate floating IP addresses with Droplets

subcommands.name: image
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage images

subcommands.name: image-action
subcommands.description: Display commands to perform actions on images

subcommands.name: load-balancer
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage load balancers

subcommands.name: region
subcommands.description: Display commands to list datacenter regions

subcommands.name: size
subcommands.description: List available Droplet sizes

subcommands.name: snapshot
subcommands.description: Access and manage snapshots

subcommands.name: ssh
subcommands.description: Access a Droplet using SSH

subcommands.name: ssh-key
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage SSH keys on your account

subcommands.name: tag
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage tags

subcommands.name: volume
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage block storage volumes

subcommands.name: volume-action
subcommands.description: Display commands to perform actions on a volume

subcommands.name: databases
subcommands.description: Display commands that manage databases

subcommands.name: backups
subcommands.description: List database cluster backups

subcommands.name: connection
subcommands.description: Retrieve connection details for a database cluster

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.description: Create a database cluster

subcommands.name: db
subcommands.description: Display commands for managing individual databases within a cluster

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Delete a database cluster

subcommands.name: firewalls
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage firewall rules (called `trusted sources` in the control panel) for database clusters

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.description: Get details for a database cluster

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List your database clusters

subcommands.name: maintenance-window
subcommands.description: Display commands for scheduling automatic maintenance on your database cluster

subcommands.name: migrate
subcommands.description: Migrate a database cluster to a new region

subcommands.name: pool
subcommands.description: Display commands for managing connection pools

subcommands.name: replica
subcommands.description: Display commands to manage read-only database replicas

subcommands.name: resize
subcommands.description: Resize a database cluster

subcommands.name: sql-mode
subcommands.description: Display commands to configure a MySQL database cluster's SQL modes

subcommands.name: user
subcommands.description: Display commands for managing database users

subcommands.name: invoice
subcommands.description: Display commands for retrieving invoices for your account

subcommands.description: Download a CSV file of an invoice

subcommands.description: Retrieve a list of all the items on an invoice

subcommands.description: List all of the invoices for your account

subcommands.description: Download a PDF file of an invoice

subcommands.name: summary
subcommands.description: Get a summary of an invoice

subcommands.description: Display commands that pertain to kubernetes 1-click applications

subcommands.description: Display commands for managing Kubernetes clusters

subcommands.name: options
subcommands.description: List possible option values for use inside Kubernetes commands

subcommands.name: monitoring
subcommands.description: [Beta] Display commands to manage monitoring

subcommands.name: alert
subcommands.description: Display commands for managing alert policies

subcommands.description: Create a new project

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Delete the specified project

subcommands.description: Retrieve details for a specific project

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List existing projects

subcommands.name: resources
subcommands.description: Manage resources assigned to a project

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update an existing project

subcommands.description: Create a private container registry

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Delete a container registry

subcommands.description: Generate a docker auth configuration for a registry

subcommands.description: Display commands for garbage collection for a container registry

subcommands.description: Retrieve details about a container registry

subcommands.description: Generate a Kubernetes secret manifest for a registry

subcommands.description: Log in Docker to a container registry

subcommands.description: Log out Docker from a container registry

subcommands.name: options
subcommands.description: List available container registry options

subcommands.name: repository
subcommands.description: Display commands for working with repositories in a container registry
